properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and validate JWT tokens.

properties.name: billing.tax
properties.description: Default tax rate for billing calculations.

properties.name: billing.discount
properties.description: Default discount rate for billing calculations.

properties.name: email.url
properties.description: Public base URL used in account activation email links.

properties.name: bootstrap.admin.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-create a default admin user when no admin exists.

properties.name: bootstrap.admin.name
properties.description: Display name for the auto-created admin account.

properties.name: bootstrap.admin.email
properties.description: Email for the auto-created admin account.

properties.name: bootstrap.admin.password
properties.description: Password for the auto-created admin account.

properties.name: bootstrap.admin.phone
properties.description: Phone number for the auto-created admin account.
